content:
@everyone 
I haven't heard a lot of progress made in this server lately.
I'm curious to know if it's an ease-of-access issue.
If I had a way to run everything through Google Sheets and embed the links to each sheet within a hub thread here in Discord, would that make things easier?
I'm considering my options and I may have a method that works.
imo i like the github a lot *because* it is separate from discord,,, as in i don't have to sort through different channels to find a pinned message or smth of the sort
the one thing i do think could be improved would be doing a minor renaming of the categories to match in game
like archives vs library

It would be possible to preserve the folder structure I have now by moving it to Google Drive, and/or sync the system with GitHub by having links to each sheet within the GitHub Repo instead of the actual files.

ooh that would be p nice,,, the links especially since i have downloaded multiple files only to open them and realize they werent what i wanted (that might have also been a naming issue, but overall it would minimize confusion i think?)

and yeah... I'm a bit out of date with the whole thing. I've had a lot going on lately and have had to step back from the project, but I'd like to continue participating by automating things more and doing less manual work in organizing the repo.
google drive sounds nice and im trying to think of any improvements that could be made upon that rather than simply transferring it over but nothings hitting me rn,,, maybe in the morning lol

the Google Drive/Sheets idea I'm considering would make it easier for the system to automate itself and allow volunteers to simply open the files and change a line and move on, and have it automatically pull those lines by diffing them with the source files
oh and for me personally ive been hit with end of school and other real life things so ill probably get bsck on some work once i settle into a new schedule
basically removing downloading/uploading from the process
oh wait thats really sick
what would be the ledger replacement? or would it be inherent from having progess being actively visible to others

That's the part I'm pondering. May need to sleep on it or do more tinkering, but for now the easiest solution is to simply replace the "ledger" with a ledger where people literally just sign their name and language when they actually do the work?
Having live sync would prevent people from stepping on each other's toes, so a proactive ledger seems unnecessary, no?
yea,,, would the ledger be in the google drive or here? im assuming itd just be for credit purposes rather than coordination
Exactly. Probably the same locations they're in now, and it would essentially just be on the honor system for everyone to credit themselves if they want credit.
But I can see what else can be figured out. For now it's bedtime and I've got work in the morning
!! makes sense

Hello <@183782216353054720> we'd actually love to use Google Drive if there's a working theory on how to implement it. We've already made our own mega-spreadsheet where we work in order to later compile it all and send it out (Prologue on its way), so we're already used to the interface, so to say

<@183782216353054720> I've been inactive for a few months but I think I have some time now to contribute (I just did Erika's psyche deepdive and am itching to fix that up lol), can you add me to the github? my name is Lykantos-8
